array.string: export PATH="/Users/myandong/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH"; exec env DRY_RUN=0 EXECUTE=1 WAIT_FOR_RECEIPT=1 EXECUTION_RETRY_MS=500 EVENT_OPEN_WINDOW_SECONDS=60 I_UNDERSTAND_42_PRICE_MARKET_RISK=YES I_AM_NOT_IN_RESTRICTED_JURISDICTION=YES STAKE_PER_OUTCOME_USDT=2 EVENT_OUTCOME_COUNT=5 ARM_WAIT_FOR_FUNDING=1 ARM_FUNDING_RETRY_MS=60000 ARM_FUNDING_HOT_RETRY_MS=1000 ARM_FUNDING_HOT_WINDOW_MS=600000 ARM_CATCH_UP_AFTER_FUNDING=1 ARM_CATCH_UP_WINDOW_MS=60000 npm run event:arm
